matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The atlas record covers Fraxinus spp.; NCSU's 600-dpi Hough plate 10 identifies the included American species as FRAXINUS AMERICANA / White Ash and prints the middle specimen as RADIAL SECTION.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened after derivation at original crop resolution. This is a close exposed radial wood face with strong horizontal growth bands and fine vertical ray fleck; there is no tree, leaf, bark, furniture, or microscopy.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries

matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The atlas record covers Fraxinus spp.; Hough plate 10 identifies this member as Fraxinus americana / White Ash and prints the lower specimen as TANGENTIAL SECTION.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened after derivation at original crop resolution. The crop contains the exposed tangential specimen face, with prominent cathedral growth-ring figure; no living plant, bark-only area, flooring, furniture, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries
